name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Experience high-quality sound without the wires. These Bluetooth headphones offer 20 hours of battery life, noise cancellation, and a comfortable over-ear design.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: Track your steps, heart rate, sleep patterns, and more with this water-resistant smart fitness band. Includes mobile app integration and up to 7-day battery life.

name: 4K Ultra HD Smart TV
description: Immerse yourself in vivid picture quality with this 55-inch 4K UHD Smart TV. Features voice control, multiple streaming apps, and HDR10 support.

name: Robot Vacuum Cleaner
description: A robotic vacuum with smart navigation, automatic recharging, and support for voice assistants. Ideal for pet hair and hardwood floors.

name: Air Fryer
description: Cook your favorite meals with less oil using this 5-liter digital air fryer. It comes with pre-set functions, temperature control, and an easy-to-clean basket.

name: Portable Projector
description: Compact projector with 1080p support, built-in speakers, and HDMI input. Perfect for movies, presentations, and gaming on the go.

name: Electric Toothbrush
description: Rechargeable toothbrush with multiple brushing modes, a two-minute timer, and a pressure sensor to ensure effective oral hygiene.

name: Noise Cancelling Earbuds
description: Wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, touch controls, and a charging case that offers up to 24 hours of total playtime.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Mesh office chair with adjustable lumbar support, headrest, and 360-degree swivel. Designed to improve posture and reduce back pain.

name: Instant Coffee Maker
description: Single-serve coffee machine with fast brewing technology, reusable filter, and a sleek, compact design suitable for small kitchens or offices.

name: Smart Home Security Camera
description: Indoor/outdoor WiFi camera with night vision, motion detection, cloud storage, and mobile alerts for real-time security monitoring.

name: Portable Power Bank
description: 10,000mAh fast-charging power bank with USB-C and USB-A ports. Lightweight and airplane-friendly for convenient travel charging.

name: Digital Drawing Tablet
description: Graphics tablet with pen pressure sensitivity, customizable buttons, and compatibility with major design software like Photoshop and Illustrator.

name: Water Purifier
description: RO+UV water purifier with advanced filtration, mineral booster, and smart filter change indicators. Ideal for home and office use.

name: Smart Light Bulb
description: WiFi-enabled LED bulb that supports voice control, scheduling, and millions of colors. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant.

name: Cordless Hair Trimmer
description: Rechargeable trimmer with multiple length settings, stainless steel blades, and a long-lasting battery. Suitable for beard and hair styling.

name: Laptop Cooling Pad
description: Slim cooling pad with silent fans, adjustable height settings, and blue LED lights to enhance airflow and laptop performance.

name: Kitchen Stand Mixer
description: Powerful stand mixer with stainless steel bowl, multiple speed settings, and attachments for kneading, mixing, and whisking.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Qi-certified fast wireless charger with anti-slip surface, LED indicators, and support for iPhones, Android, and other compatible devices.

name: Smart Thermostat
description: Energy-saving thermostat with remote app control, learning behavior patterns, and integration with smart home systems.
